Meat chunks are merged with [MAIN] because 100% of the ballistic damage is transferred. If you are simulating an explosive weapon, you will have to use the custom HP field to adjust the [MAIN] pool according to the amount of damage the blast inflicts on the various "Meat chunks" parts. You can also subtract 50 HP for each destroyed arm.

If you use an explosive weapon, the simulated results will represent the case where the central mass is targeted and may be innacurate if the inner radius of the explosion is too small and/or if you hit the top chunk. If Inner radius ≤1.5m, it is preferable to vary the firing angles to destroy all the chunks. Otherwise, it's best to aim for the centre of the fleshmob's body.
